name: Breesport Community Park
description: Come play pickleball at Breesport Community Park in Breesport, NY! There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Ernie Davis Academy
description: Come play pickleball at Ernie Davis Academy in Elmira, NY! There are 8 outdoor courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are private.

name: Family Fitness Center
description: Family Fitness Center is a place to play pickleball in Elmira, NY. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts can be reserved.
fees: Fee required — FREE to members; non-members pay $7 drop-in fee

name: FLX Pickleball Club
description: FLX Pickleball Club is a place to play pickleball in Horseheads, NY. There are 6 indoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms, youth programming, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, and trainers or lessons. You can reserve the courts.

name: JaMS Fitness Club
description: Visit us on Court Reserve to view our schedule.

name: Pirozzolo  Park
description: Pirozzolo Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Elmira, NY. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to food, restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free. Reservations are not available.

name: Southport Senior Citizens Center
description: Southport Senior Citizens Center is a place to play pickleball in Pine City, NY. There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms.
